Title: Senior Front-End Engineer
Description:
About the job
About Payoneer

Founded in 2005, Payoneer is the global financial platform that removes friction from doing business across borders, with a mission to connect the world’s underserved businesses to a rising global economy. We’re a community with over 2,500 colleagues all over the world, working to serve customers, and partners in over 190 countries and territories.

By taking the complexity out of the financial workflows–including everything from global payments and compliance to multi-currency and workforce management, to providing working capital and business intelligence–we give businesses the tools they need to work efficiently worldwide and grow with confidence.

Location: Gurugram - India

Full-time

Role Summary

We are seeking a creative and skilled Frontend Developer to build modern, responsive, and high performance web applications. You will collaborate closely with our design, backend, and product teams to implement new features, enhance user experiences, and maintain existing applications

What You’ll Be Spending Your Time On

Play a key role in shaping the future of Payoneer’s application UI and setting high standards and best practices.
Building the UI of a comprehensive React application and developing our products and code for millions of customers in the fintech industry
Solving complex problems with creative and practical solutions
Implement features and user interfaces of Payoneer’s customers cross border
Design and build efficient, reusable, scalable & testable FrontEnd
Collaborate with our amazing Product Designers, Product Managers, and Software Engineers to deliver compelling user-facing products
Proactively identify areas of improvement in team systems, processes, and scalability
Lead by example in code quality, contributing significantly to code reviews
Monitor production systems and investigate potential issues

Have You Done This Kind Of Stuff

At least 6 years of experience in client-side development
6+ years of JavaScript/TypeScript experience including asynchronous programming and closures
6+ years of experience using React and the latest technologies
Hands-on experience with web applications architecture
Ability to collaborate effectively and communicate technical concepts to diverse stakeholders
Excellent communication skills – high level of English

Not a Must, But a Great Advantage

Experience working in a Saas product company.
Experience with Context, Router 5, Styled Components.
Familiarity in server-side technologies
BTech/BA/BSc in Computer Science, Software Engineering.

The Payoneer Ways of Working

Act as our customer’s partner on the inside

Learning what they need and creating what will help them go further.

Do it. Own it.

Being fearlessly accountable in everything we do.

Continuously improve

Always striving for a higher standard than our last.

Build Each Other Up

Helping each other grow, as professionals and people.

If this sounds like a business, a community, and a mission you want to be part of, apply today.

We are committed to providing a diverse and inclusive workplace. Payoneer is an equal opportunity employer, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment no matter your race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. If you require reasonable accommodation at any stage of the hiring process, please speak to the recruiter managing the role for any adjustments. Decisions about requests for reasonable accommodation are made on a case-by-case basis.

Title: SDE II - Frontend
Description:
About the job
This job is sourced from a job board. Learn More
We are looking for a highly skilled SDE II Frontend Developer with a strong design sense and hands-on experience in modern JavaScript frameworks. The ideal candidate should be passionate about building seamless user experiences and scalable interfaces for web applications.

Responsibilities

Collaborate with UX/UI designers, product managers, and backend developers to implement responsive, high-performance web applications.
Translate design wireframes and mockups into pixel-perfect, functional frontend code.
Build reusable components and front-end libraries using modern frameworks like Angular (v10+), React, or Vue.
Maintain cross-browser compatibility and responsive design across various screen sizes and devices.
Work with RESTful APIs and handle asynchronous data handling using modern JavaScript techniques (fetch, axios, etc. ).
Write unit and integration tests using frameworks like Jasmine, Karma, or Jest.
Optimize application performance and scalability.
Contribute to design decisions, UI/UX improvements, and best practices across the frontend architecture.

Requirements

4+ years of experience in front-end development with a strong foundation in UI/UX design principles.
2+ years of experience with modern JavaScript frameworks such as Angular 2+ (preferably Angular 10+), React.js, or Vue.js .
Proficient in HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript (ES6/ESNext), and front-end build tools like Webpack or Vite.
Strong knowledge of UI component libraries such as Angular Material, Bootstrap, or Tailwind CSS.
Experience with data visualization libraries like D3.js, C3.js, Chart.js, or similar.
Familiarity with state management tools like NgRx, Redux, or Vuex.
Deep understanding of JavaScript quirks, scope, closure, promises, and async/await.
Experience with UI modularization, reusable components, and design system integration.
Comfortable working with RESTful APIs and tools like Postman and Swagger.
Solid understanding of cross-browser compatibility issues and techniques to resolve them.
Keen eye for detail and a strong commitment to delivering high-quality user experiences.
Excellent problem-solving, debugging, and multitasking skills.

This job was posted by Laveena Soni from Skeps.

Desired Skills and Experience
CSS,HTML,JavaScript,Angular,React.js,Vue.js

Title: Senior Software Engineer-Frontend
Description:
About the job
About TartanHQ

TartanHQ is an AI-first enterprise-tech company backed by 500 Global, Info Edge Ventures, and AngelList. We've raised ~$8.5M and are rapidly scaling toward profitability. Our platform powers operations for India's leading financial institutions including HDFC Bank, Bajaj Allianz, Care Health, Yes Bank, and 50+ enterprises.

We provide three core products: HyperVerify (80+ verification APIs), HyperSync (unified APIs for HRMS/ERP/CRM), and HyperApps (AI agents for insurance, banking, and compliance automation).

Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Frontend Engineer with 4-7 years of experience to lead the frontend development of TartanHQ's HR/payroll platform. You will design and implement responsive, performant UIs using React and Next.js, own component architecture, and ensure excellent user experience across all products. Your expertise in modern frontend practices will shape how thousands of users interact with TartanHQ daily.

Key KPIs

Sprint delivery utilization: >90%
Core Web Vitals: All in green
Pull request reviews: 100% coverage
Test coverage: 80%+

Day-to-Day Responsibilities

Your week includes: component development and UI implementation, code reviews and design feedback, performance optimization and testing, sprint planning and standups, and collaboration with design and product teams. You'll own features from wireframe to production within 2-week sprints.

Core Responsibilities

UI Development (50% time allocation)

Build responsive UIs using React and Next.js
Implement pixel-perfect designs with TypeScript
Create reusable components and design systems
Implement state management with Redux or Zustand
Style applications with Tailwind CSS or CSS-in-JS
Handle responsive design across all device sizes

Performance & Quality (30% time allocation)

Optimize Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS)
Implement code splitting and lazy loading
Write unit tests with Jest and integration tests with Cypress
Maintain test coverage >80%
Debug and fix performance bottlenecks

Leadership & Collaboration (20% time allocation)

Review code and provide technical guidance
Collaborate with designers on implementation details
Work with backend engineers on API integration
Mentor junior frontend engineers

Required Skills & Qualifications

4-7 years of frontend development experience
B.Tech in Computer Science or related field
Expert proficiency in React with modern hooks
Strong Next.js experience
Solid TypeScript fundamentals
Experience with state management libraries
Proficiency with CSS, Tailwind, or CSS-in-JS
Hands-on testing experience (Jest, Cypress, React Testing Library)
Understanding of responsive design principles
Git and CI/CD pipeline experience

Preferred Skills

Design system development experience
Web accessibility (WCAG 2.1) implementation
Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and Static Generation
Micro-frontends architecture
Web Performance APIs and monitoring

What We Look For

Excellence: You ship pixel-perfect, performant code
Ownership: You take responsibility for user experience
Growth: You stay updated with frontend best practices
Collaboration: You work well with designers and product
Detail-oriented: You care about accessibility and performance

Reporting To

Engineering Manager

Title: Frontend Developer
Description:
About the job
This job is sourced from a job board. Learn More
Clickpost is Asia’s fastest-growing Logistics Intelligence Platform working with leading retailers across India (including 6 Unicorns) to help them manage 120+ Logistics partners via a single API gateway.

We are funded by Times Internet, Rebright partners, and other marquee investors and are consecutively profitable. We have grown 5x in the past 1 year.

We are hiring a Frontend developer for our team. The person will be directly contributing to our exponential growth.

### Responsibilities

Translate wireframes/designs to high-quality code.
Design and maintain reusable, reliable and high-performance code.
Ensuring web design is optimized for smartphones.
Maintaining brand consistency throughout the design.
Identify Bottlenecks and come up with the optimised and scalable solution.
Help maintain code quality by code reviews and automation of operations.

### What you bring to us from the professional side

2+ Years experience in OO JavaScript and Front-end frameworks specifically.
Expertise knowledge of HTML5/ CSS3/ JavaScript.
Familiar with UI layouts, SASS, Bootstrap, and the CSS GRID system.
Proficient with JavaScript frameworks/libraries such as React, AngularJs, jQuery, etc.
Good understanding of asynchronous request handling, partial page updates, and Ajax.
Proficient understanding of cross-browser compatibility issues and ways to work around them.
Experience with various JavaScript module bundlers (e.g. webpack, gulp, etc.).
Experience with graphic design applications such as Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD, Photoshop(PSD to HTML).
Proficient understanding of code versioning tools, such as Git, Mercurial, or SVN.

### Nice to haves

Bonus to have an understanding of backend technologies like NodeJs & Python.
Knowledge of isomorphic React.

### You would be a good fit if?

No, you need not know it all, but are inquisitive and have a willingness to learn.
We don’t believe in micro-management hence, you should be open to feedback, take ownership of tasks, and has a tremendous passion for the work.
Humble and Adaptive in approach.
We are transparent as a company and expect you to be transparent and trustworthy.
We are a growing startup, you should be able to catch up with the hustle and be proactive. Skills:- Javascript, HTML/CSS, React.js, TypeScript, NodeJS (Node.js), AngularJS (1.x) and Python

Title: Senior Frontend Developer
Description:
About the job
Overview

We are seeking a skilled Front-End Developer with a strong background in modern web technologies to join our innovative team. The ideal candidate will have significant experience building high-quality, scalable, and responsive user interfaces using React.js.

Responsibilities

Develop and maintain front-end architecture for scalable and high-performance web applications.
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code using HTML, SCSS, CSS, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
Build dynamic and interactive web applications and dashboards using React.js, Next.js (preferrable) and related libraries.
Leverage modern JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript to enhance code maintainability and performance.
Implement reusable components using React’s component-based architecture and hooks.
Manage application state effectively using state management tools such as Redux (Toolkit), Zustand, or React Context API.
Optimize web performance using tools such as Google Web Vitals and PageSpeed Insights.
Utilize Service Workers and Web Workers to implement multi-threaded capabilities for smoother user experiences.
Work with modern build tools like Vite, Webpack, and apply linting tools such as ESLint and Prettier for code quality.
Integrate third-party APIs including Google Maps JavaScript API and enable real-time features with WebSockets.
Perform thorough testing and optimization of UI components to ensure high usability and responsiveness.
Collaborate closely with designers, back-end developers, and other stakeholders to deliver seamless user experiences.
Participate in code reviews, mentor junior developers, and contribute actively to team discussions and architectural decisions

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
7 to 9 years of relevant work experience in front-end development.
Strong proficiency in HTML, SCSS, CSS, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
Hands-on experience with React.js and its ecosystem (e.g., App Router, TanStack Query).
Expertise in designing and developing user interfaces using HTML5, SCSS and CSS3.
Solid understanding of front-end development principles and best practices.

If you are a talented Frontend Developer and have a passion for building high-quality web sites, we would love to hear from you.

Title: Sr. Frontend Developer (React)
Description:
About the job
Are you an experienced Frontend Engineer with a strong background in React, Redux, TypeScript, CSS, and HTML? Do you have experience with AWS Cognito for secure authentication?

Join our innovative team and be a key contributor to our cutting-edge AI Platform for the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry.

Tasks

Collaborate with cross-functional teams for seamless integration of frontend components with backend services

Create reusable, clean, and well-documented code with HTML, CSS, and other frontend technologies

Participate in code reviews, debugging, and troubleshooting of frontend systems

Stay abreast of emerging frontend technologies and industry best practices to drive continuous improvement

Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or a related field

Minimum 5 years of professional experience as a Frontend Engineer, preferably with React, Redux, and TypeScript

Strong proficiency in HTML, CSS, and client-side JavaScript

Experience with AWS Cognito or similar authentication services

Proven expertise in building scalable, high-performance frontend applications for B2C or B2B software products

Familiarity with backend technologies and RESTful JSON APIs is a plus

Solid architectural skills with a focus on performance, scalability, and security

Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment processes

Excellent problem-solving and communication skills


Benefits

Work with Purpose: Join a dynamic, cross-functional team shaping the future of cutting-edge technology in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

Growth That Moves With You: Take advantage of continuous learning opportunities, mentorship, and a clear path for professional development and career progression.

Modern Workplace: Enjoy a thoughtfully designed office equipped with modern amenities to support your productivity and well-being.

Global Culture: Be part of a diverse and international team that values different perspectives—complete with regular team events, retreats, and cultural exchanges.

Title: Frontend (React.js) Developer
Description:
About the job
Job Summary

The Frontend (React.js) developer role at group.one is a strategic position focused on developing and enhancing scalable and secure SaaS products that help small and medium-sized businesses in Europe grow by simplifying how they communicate, collaborate, and manage their online presence - all from a single, integrated platform. This role requires close collaboration with Group Head, Team Lead, and Product Manager.

Job Description

Software development: Develop, maintain client-side applications, user interfaces
Scalable modular design: Design or refactor the architecture into loosely coupled components, create reusable components across products, and ensure they are easy to update and replace
Technical Leadership: Provide expert guidance and mentorship to development teams, promoting best practices in coding, design patterns, and frameworks
Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with UX/UI designers, front-end developers, product managers to translate and align the design with the strategic goals of the product, ensuring scalability, efficiency, and ease of integration
Project Planning: Participate in project planning by providing accurate estimations, identifying integration points, and assessing technical risks with mitigation strategies
Code Quality Oversight: Ensure code quality aligns with design and architectural principles through regular code reviews, focusing on security, scalability, and maintainability
Performance Optimization: Ensure optimal application performance, responsiveness, and scalability across different devices and browsers

Mandatory

Skills requirements:

React.js
State-Management (Redux, context API)
JavaScript and TypeScript
CSS preprocessor (Less, Sass)
Component composition and reusability
Version control systems (Git)
Unit testing frameworks (Jest and React-testing-library)
Optimizing applications for performance and scalability
Problem-solving, data structures, and algorithms
Confluence and Jira

Good To Have

Understanding of Web workers
Experience building PWA application
Experience with React Native
Knowledge of REST API tools

Education And Experience Requirements

Bachelor’s degree (B.Tech. or B.E.) in Computer Science or Information Technology
5–8 years of relevant experience in frontend development using ReactJS and TypeScript

Keywords

React JS, Redux, TypeScript, JavaScript, Jest, React-testing-library, CSS processors, React-Native, CDN, Code review, Code quality, Git, SonarQube, Webpack, Babel, NPM, Unit testing, Design principles, Data structures, Algorithms, Confluence, Jira, Agile

We welcome talent in all its diversity. Your gender, background, age, beliefs, or personal story do not define your opportunities here, what matters to us is mutual respect, personal appreciation, and creating a workplace where motivation and collaboration thrive. We believe in supporting your personal and professional growth, recognizing you as both an individual and a valued team member.

We want to continue to grow with you and why we look forward to getting to know you.

Welcome to one.com, where innovation meets passion. We are a leading web hosting and domain registration company dedicated to empowering individuals and businesses online. Since 2002, we have been committed to delivering reliable, user-friendly, and affordable web services. Our mission is to make it easy for anyone to build and maintain an online presence, and we believe in integrity, innovation, and putting our customers first.

Title: Frontend Engineer
Description:
About the job
About Flixstock:
Flixstock builds AI-powered image and video generation products operating at scale. We are developing GTM-ready creative platforms that combine AI inference pipelines, media processing systems, and distributed backend services. The frontend plays a critical role in shaping user experience for complex AI workflows.

Role Overview:
We are hiring a Mid-Level Frontend Engineer who will take end-to-end ownership of an entire product frontend. This role involves building complex React applications with custom UI systems, timeline editors, real-time job tracking, and media preview workflows.

Key Responsibilities:
• Own the complete frontend architecture for a product module.
• Develop scalable React applications using Redux for state management.
• Build and optimize custom UI components and internal design systems.
• Develop complex features such as timeline editors and media preview interfaces.
• Implement real-time updates using WebSockets or similar technologies.
• Handle authentication flows and secure frontend architecture.
• Collaborate closely with backend engineers on API contracts and integration.
• Optimize frontend performance for large media rendering and data-heavy views.
• Ensure high-quality user experience with minimal bugs and production issues.

Must-Have Skills:
• 4+ years of frontend development experience.
• Strong proficiency in React.
• Hands-on experience with Redux for state management.
• Experience building complex, data-heavy frontend applications.
• Experience implementing real-time UI updates.
• Strong understanding of frontend performance optimization.
• Experience handling authentication and secure frontend flows.
• Product-based company experience preferred.

Good-to-Have:
• Experience building media editing or timeline-based interfaces.
• Experience working on AI-driven products.
• Familiarity with large-scale SaaS applications.
• Exposure to startup environments with high ownership.

Engineering Expectations:
• Strong ownership mindset with ability to independently drive features to completion.
• Startup hustle – ability to move fast while maintaining code quality.
• Product-oriented thinking – focus on usability and reliability.
• Ability to translate complex backend systems into intuitive user interfaces.

Success Metrics (First 6 Months):
• Delivery of a GTM-ready frontend product.
• Seamless integration with backend APIs and AI workflows.
• Stable UI performance with minimal unexpected bugs.
• Efficient handling of media-heavy interfaces.

Growth Path-
High performers can grow into Frontend Lead or Platform Lead roles, driving architectural decisions and UI standards across products.

Title: Frontend developer- Reactjs
Description:
About the job
About the job
About B2B SaaS and Bizight Solutions
Bizight Solutions Pvt Ltd specializes in delivering innovative SaaS solutions that empower businesses to thrive in the digital era.
SalesPanda – Digital Automation:
SalesPanda is a Sales & Marketing Automation Platform designed to help companies grow their business digitally through channel partners such as insurance agents, distributors, and resellers. With features like Content Marketing, Social Media Marketing, Email Marketing, Lead Management, and Website Activity Tracking, it acts as an integrated platform to expand digital reach via channel ecosystems.
WhiteOwl – AI Sales platform for Consultants:
WhiteOwl is an AI-based SaaS platform dedicated to accelerating sales and business development for consulting firms using intelligent AI agents

    Job Description -React.js Developer
We are looking for a skilled React.js developer to join our front-end development team. In this role, you
will be responsible for developing and implementing user interface components using React.js concepts
and workflows such as Redux, Flux, and Webpack. You will also be responsible for profiling and
improving front-end performance and documenting our front-end codebase.

To ensure success as a React.js developer, you should have in-depth knowledge of JavaScript and React
concepts, excellent front-end coding skills, and a good understanding of progressive web applications.
Ultimately, a top-class React.js developer should be able to design and build modern user interface
components to enhance application performance.

Responsibilities:
· Meeting with the development team to discuss user interface ideas and applications. Reviewing
application requirements and interface designs.
· Identifying web-based user interactions.
· Developing and implementing highly responsive user interface components using React
concepts.
· Writing application interface codes using JavaScript following React.js workflows.
Troubleshooting interface software and debugging application codes.
· Developing and implementing front-end architecture to support user interface concepts.
Monitoring and improving front-end performance.
· Documenting application changes and developing updates.

Requirements:
Education: Full-time B.Tech/BE (or equivalent) in Computer Science or related IT fields required
· Previous experience of 3-5 years working as a React.js developer.
· In-depth knowledge of JavaScript, CSS, HTML, and front-end languages.
· Knowledge of REACT tools including React.js, Webpack, Enzyme, Redux, and Flux.
